name: summarizer
description: Creates summaries and compiles final clinical reports. Produces structured clinical briefs with key findings, questions identified, statistical summary, and recommendations.

capabilities.name: text_summarization
capabilities.description: Create extractive summaries of clinical text

capabilities.name: clinical_brief
capabilities.description: Produce structured clinical briefs with findings and recommendations via LLM

capabilities.name: report_compilation
capabilities.description: Compile analysis results into a coherent final report
